Manufacturing accounts

Manufacturing accounting software for vendor bills, expenses and bank payments.

Manufacturers often lose time collecting bills, recording expenses and matching bank payments. Fastbooks helps prepare the accounting entry draft earlier.

Request Early Access Use GST calculator

Core workflow

What Fastbooks helps prepare.

Vendor bill capture

Capture purchase bills and raw material expense context before paperwork piles up.

Operational expenses

Record maintenance, freight, labour-related and daily factory costs from voice notes or bill photos.

Review before posting

Keep ledger and GST treatment under accountant control before final posting.

Common needs

Accounts work this page is built around.

✓Vendor bills
✓Factory expenses
✓Bank payments
✓GST hints
✓Ledger review
✓Accountant approval

FFastbooks

Accounting software for Indian businesses that prepares sales, purchase, expense and bank entries from everyday inputs for accountant review.
